## Description

Describe what changed and why. Include enough context for a reviewer to
understand the user-facing behavior, operational impact, or maintenance reason.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Build/CI/tooling change
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes an existing public contract)

## Testing Done

List the checks you ran and the result. For example:

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual verification:

## Screenshots or Logs

Add screenshots for UI changes, or paste the relevant log excerpt for behavior
changes and bug fixes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My PR targets the `main` branch
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes, or I explained why tests are not needed
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-facing or contributor-facing changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry or release note is included when appropriate
- [ ] Security, privacy, and migration implications were considered

## Related Issues

Closes #
